title: olinia cymosa var. latifolia
intro: Olinia cymosa var. latifolia, also known as the forest illawarra or broad-leaved forest illawarra, is a shrub or small tree species native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Olinia cymosa var. latifolia include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are also used in topical applications to promote healing and soothe irritated skin.
